leagueBriefing: Friday night in the NHL was all about momentum swings: contenders trading haymakers, stars delivering in late-game moments, and several teams getting immediate returns from deadline decisions. Florida got a desperately needed win behind Matthew Tkachuk's hat trick, Colorado snapped Dallas' 10-game run in dramatic fashion, and Anaheim survived a wild third period to keep its post-break surge alive.

games.headline: Tkachuk's hat trick halts Florida skid and keeps faint playoff hopes alive
games.brief: Florida finally stopped the bleeding in Detroit, and it came on the stick of Matthew Tkachuk. His third-period power-play goal broke the tie and his empty-netter sealed it, snapping the Panthers' four-game losing streak at a time when every point matters in a tightening East wild-card chase.
bullets: Matthew Tkachuk recorded his sixth career hat trick, including the go-ahead power-play goal 35 seconds into the third.
Sergei Bobrovsky made 27 saves after Florida held onto him at the trade deadline.
Detroit got its lone goal from Alex DeBrincat, his team-leading 33rd of the season.
Red Wings captain Dylan Larkin exited in the third period with an apparent leg injury after an awkward fall.
Florida entered the night eight points behind Boston for the final East wild-card spot.
games.context: The Panthers avoided a damaging fifth straight loss, but they still need a serious late push to avoid becoming a rare reigning Cup champion to miss the playoffs.

highlights.title: Panthers vs. Red Wings | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026

games.headline: Colorado stuns Dallas late, then wins shootout to end Stars' 10-game heater
games.brief: Dallas looked poised to keep rolling, but Colorado ripped the script apart in the final seconds. Valeri Nichushkin tied it with 15 seconds left in regulation, then the Avalanche finished it in the shootout to hand the Stars their first loss since January and reassert control at the top of the Central.
bullets: Valeri Nichushkin scored with 15 seconds left to force overtime, then converted in the shootout.
Martin Necas posted four points (1 goal, 3 assists) and added the clinching shootout goal.
Nathan MacKinnon scored his NHL-leading 42nd goal and added two assists.
Dallas had its franchise-record 10-game winning streak snapped.
Scott Wedgewood relieved Mackenzie Blackwood early in the second and stopped all 10 shots he faced before shutting out Dallas in the shootout.
games.context: This was a playoff-style Central Division statement game, with Colorado widening the gap over Dallas in a race likely to decide postseason seeding.

highlights.title: Avalanche vs. Stars | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026

games.headline: Canucks finally break through in Chicago to snap seven-game slide
games.brief: Vancouver had been stuck in a brutal rut, but Friday looked like a release valve. The Canucks survived a back-and-forth night in Chicago, then pulled away in the third with Brock Boeser providing the go-ahead goal and an empty-net dagger to stop a seven-game losing streak.
bullets: Brock Boeser scored the tiebreaking goal at 2:40 of the third and later added an empty-netter.
Vancouver won for the first time since Jan. 29 after losing 10 of its previous 11 games.
The Canucks scored three times in the first 6:32 and built an early 3-2 lead.
Nikita Tolopilo made 20 saves for Vancouver.
Chicago dropped its fourth game in five since the Olympic break.
games.context: For Vancouver, this was less about style points and more about ending a spiral after major roster churn around the deadline.

highlights.title: Canucks vs. Blackhawks | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026

games.headline: Hurricanes keep rolling as Blake's two-goal night buries Oilers
games.brief: Carolina played like a team with a clear identity and confidence, overwhelming Edmonton with depth scoring and clean puck movement. Jackson Blake scored twice, K'Andre Miller drove play with three assists, and the Hurricanes kept their hot stretch humming against a fading Oilers side.
bullets: Jackson Blake scored twice and K'Andre Miller added three assists for Carolina.
The Hurricanes improved to 40-16-6 and have won seven of eight.
Nikolaj Ehlers had a goal and an assist and reached 20 goals for the ninth time in 11 seasons.
Edmonton has lost six of eight, with Zach Hyman scoring two in defeat.
Connor McDavid recorded an assist to extend his point streak to six games.
games.context: Carolina looks every bit like a top East contender, while Edmonton's recent slide is turning urgency up ahead of the stretch run.

highlights.title: Hurricanes vs. Oilers | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026

games.headline: Ducks erase collapse late and outlast Canadiens in six-round shootout
games.brief: Anaheim looked headed for a crushing blown lead before Chris Kreider rescued it with 42 seconds left and the Ducks finished the job in the sixth round of the shootout. It was chaotic, high-event hockey, and Anaheim once again proved it can survive wild endings right now.
bullets: Chris Kreider tied it with 42 seconds left and finished with four points, matching his career best.
Alex Killorn scored the winner in the sixth shootout round; Anaheim improved to 8-0 in shootouts this season.
The Ducks blew a two-goal third-period lead but still earned their seventh win in eight games.
Cole Caufield scored twice in the third for Montreal and reached 37 goals on the season.
Anaheim recorded its 19th comeback victory, tied for the NHL lead.
games.context: Anaheim's ability to keep winning messy games is becoming a defining trait, while Montreal continues to leak points late.

highlights.title: Canadiens vs. Ducks | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026

games.headline: Wild blitz Vegas in a three-minute burst and ride Gustavsson to road win
games.brief: Minnesota turned one stretch of the second period into the whole game, scoring three times in just over three minutes to seize control in Vegas. Filip Gustavsson did the rest with 30 saves, and the Wild banked a quality road result against a fellow division contender.
bullets: The Wild scored three goals in a 3:07 span in the second period to break the game open.
Filip Gustavsson made 30 saves and carried a shutout into the third period.
Mats Zuccarello, Zach Bogosian and Michael McCarron scored in the second-period surge.
McCarron also picked up an assist in his Minnesota debut.
Vegas got third-period goals from Pavel Dorofeyev (30th of season) and Mitch Marner.
games.context: Minnesota's deadline-adjusted lineup showed immediate traction in a matchup with clear playoff-seeding implications.

highlights.title: Wild vs. Golden Knights | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026

games.headline: Post-deadline Blues grind out OT win as Robert Thomas stays scorching
games.brief: Hours after shipping out captain Brayden Schenn, St. Louis showed some backbone in San Jose. Robert Thomas buried the overtime winner and the Blues found a way despite a thin blue line, giving them a third straight win during what looked like a transition day for the franchise.
bullets: Robert Thomas scored twice, including the overtime winner 54 seconds into OT.
Thomas has four goals in three games since returning from injury.
St. Louis won its third straight despite dressing only five healthy defensemen.
Kiefer Sherwood tied it for San Jose in the third after signing a five-year, $28.75 million extension earlier in the week.
The Blues dealt Brayden Schenn and Justin Faulk before the deadline, signaling a future-focused direction.
games.context: Even after deadline sell-off moves, St. Louis is still competing hard, and Thomas is emerging as the central piece of that next phase.

highlights.title: Blues vs. Sharks | NHL Highlights | March 06, 2026
